response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title 'Kamisama no Hanabira' (神様の花びら) via on-screen text at 00:41. The performers are Hololive ReGLOSS members Otonose Kanade, Ichijou Ririka, Juufuutei Raden, and Todoroki Hajime. Performed search for '"Kamisama no Hanabira" Japanese and English lyrics' and '"Kamisama no Hanabira" lyrics hololive', but no official lyrics could be retrieved. As a result, both original and English lyrics are set to null.
response.global_summary: A live 3D concert performance by the Hololive ReGLOSS unit (Otonose Kanade, Ichijou Ririka, Juufuutei Raden, and Todoroki Hajime) performing the song "Kamisama no Hanabira".

scenes.description: Hololive ReGLOSS members performing 'Kamisama no Hanabira' on a 3D concert stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Otonose Kanade, Ichijou Ririka, Juufuutei Raden, Todoroki Hajime
